tests.description: ATDD API tests for story 2.4 request-to-commitment linkage and terminal enforcement (RED PHASE)
acceptance_criteria_covered: Request lifecycle resolves to explicit terminal state
Accepted requests are linked through canonical commitment linkage path
Commitment lifecycle remains independently terminalizable after linkage
Reconciliation guidance is exposed for linkage or terminal enforcement failures
Response envelope remains stable for success and refusal outcomes
